strengths: Strong SQL and Python analytics experience
Experience with modern cloud data stack
weaknesses: Agency performance and policy outcomes not demonstrated
Shorter tenure in relevant insurance roles
improvement_bullets: Developed geographic and spatial analysis workflows in Python to evaluate risk-based geo-location trends, supporting more accurate underwriting assessments.
Integrated vendor-provided data and proprietary system inputs to standardize protection class reporting, ensuring data consistency for underwriting risk actions.
Analyzed agency performance data, including policy outcomes and cancellation trends, to drive system enhancements that improved compliance and underwriting efficiency.
Led cross-functional project rollouts by integrating disparate system and vendor datasets, ensuring project deliverables met business requirements and timelines.
Collaborated with operations and sales teams to align agency management metrics with business rules, reducing reporting discrepancies by 40%.
cover_letter: Dear Hiring Manager, I am excited to submit my application for the Product Analyst opportunity with SageSure. I am interested in this opportunity because of SageSure's reputation as a leader in catastrophe-exposed property insurance and its focus on using data to drive underwriting precision. What interests me about working for SageSure is its entrepreneurial spirit combined with the stability of a growing MGU, which inspires me because it mirrors my own approach to building scalable, data-driven solutions in fast-paced environments. I believe my technical proficiency in SQL and Python and my experience in project management would make me a strong candidate for this role. During my professional career, I have approached problems by translating complex data into actionable business strategy. In fact, while at Shine Masters, I identified high-value customer segments using statistical models and Python automation, which directly informed marketing initiatives that drove a 300% increase in revenue for those segments. Ultimately, I know that the Product Analyst role at SageSure would allow me to bring my data analytics expertise to optimize underwriting decisions and risk monitoring. Additionally, my role as a Data Analyst & Operations Lead at Shine Masters enabled me to develop my project management skills. I led the transition to automated Power BI and Looker reporting, which replaced manual workflows and resulted in a 40% increase in efficiency and significantly higher data accuracy across cross-functional teams. I’m excited by the opportunity to use my background in data governance and vendor system integration in working on risk-related program rollouts at SageSure. I know that my technical versatility and focus on data quality align with what it takes to succeed at the Product Analyst role. I would love the opportunity to discuss the role in more detail. Thank you for your time and consideration. I look forward to hearing from you soon. Warm regards, Justin Miller
